purpose: Freeze the Hanwha five-company reference-slice questions used to evaluate whether the common harness can route selected Hanwha affiliates, select source-backed claims, and produce investor-facing answers under the same contract used for the other corporate-group slices.

paperUse.allowedClaim: Hanwha demonstrates the same five-company reference-slice structure used for the other corporate groups, with one question per selected listed company and one cross-affiliate comparison.
paperUse.notAllowedClaim: These scenarios do not prove full production readiness or full five-group source coverage.
paperUse.expansionNote: Additional Hanwha affiliates can be added by registering identifiers, source manifests, extracted records, source-backed claims, wiki pages, and affiliate-routing checks under the same schema.

answerPolicy: Answer must be investor-facing Korean prose, not development-status prose.
Answer must not expose raw prompt text or private extraction text.
Answer must disclose when latest news or market data is not connected live.
Visible answer must not expose raw source-backed claim IDs.
Selected source-backed claim IDs must remain available in response.sourceClaims and exported trace JSON.
runtimeAssumptions.claimMatchPolicy: expectedClaimIds are minimum required source-backed claims. Additional selected claims are allowed when the question overlaps another verified claim class.

scenarios.title: Hanwha Inc. financial performance
scenarios.question: ㈜한화 2025년 연결 실적을 매출·영업이익·영업이익률 기준으로 요약해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether Hanwha Inc. questions route to the listed holding company and select official financial source-backed claims.

scenarios.title: Hanwha Aerospace financial driver
scenarios.question: 한화에어로스페이스 2026년 1분기 실적과 영업이익 개선 포인트를 공식 자료 기준으로 요약해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether Hanwha Aerospace questions route to Hanwha Aerospace and select affiliate-scoped financial and business-driver claims.

scenarios.title: Hanwha Solutions turnaround drivers
scenarios.question: 한화솔루션 2025년 실적과 2026년 1분기 흑자전환 요인을 공식 자료 기준으로 정리해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether Hanwha Solutions questions route to Hanwha Solutions and select affiliate-scoped financial and turnaround-driver claims.

scenarios.title: Hanwha Systems financial and defense segment check
scenarios.question: 한화시스템 2025년 실적과 방산 부문 매출 흐름을 공식 자료 기준으로 요약해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether Hanwha Systems questions route to Hanwha Systems and select affiliate-scoped financial and defense-segment claims.

scenarios.title: Hanwha Ocean financial driver
scenarios.question: 한화오션 2025년 실적과 2026년 1분기 영업이익 개선을 공식 자료 기준으로 요약해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether Hanwha Ocean questions route to Hanwha Ocean and select affiliate-scoped financial and improvement-driver claims.

scenarios.title: Hanwha Aerospace and Hanwha Solutions investment-point comparison
scenarios.question: 한화에어로스페이스와 한화솔루션의 투자 포인트를 비교해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether a cross-affiliate Hanwha comparison preserves explicit company mentions, selects promoted affiliate-level source-backed claims, and does not expose development trace details.
